name: Holo IPFS
summary: Browse the entire IPFS space as easily as the web every block verified.

description.p: Content addressing is powerful, but usually hidden behind a daemon and an install.
A gateway that speaks IPFS natively in the browser re-derives every block's multihash before showing it (Law L5).

ul: Every block verified by its multihash

releases.description: Hologram-native IPFS gateway: trustless in-browser block verification (Law L5), UnixFS directory browsing, typed file preview, ipns://+DNSLink resolution, delegated-routing provider discovery, local no-daemon add, and pin-to-own into the κ-store. Multiformats + IPLD (dag-pb/UnixFS/dag-cbor/CARv1), witnessed against the official BLAKE3 vectors and the canonical empty-dir CID.
